insight: You've just taken the first step by completing your first session, and although your current average score is 10%, this initial attempt provides a valuable baseline to build upon and identify areas where you can focus your efforts to improve. As you move forward, try to focus on small, incremental increases in your score, such as aiming to raise your average by 5-10% in the next few sessions, which can help you establish a sense of progress and momentum, even after just a 1-day streak.
